steps.title: Use the ecosystem contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts a single-species approach with an ecosystem-based approach. The ecosystem approach is presented as stronger because it considers interactions among climate, terrain, and various species in a given area.

steps.title: Reject claims that miss interaction
steps.content: A shifts to the distribution of Mammillaria species across Mexico. B invents reduced competition from climate change. C says the problem is moving attention away from the cactus, but the passage says the problem is too narrow a focus. The answer is D.
